mapper.sql: oa.id, oa.name, oa.code, oa.region, oa.city_id, c.name AS city_name, oa.channel, oa.type, oa.status, oa.cover, oa.landing_url, oa.rule_json, oa.start_at, oa.end_at, oa.created_by, oa.updated_by, oa.created_at, oa.updated_at, COALESCE(stats.item_count, 0) AS item_count

oai.id, oai.activity_id, oai.target_type, oai.target_id, COALESCE(s.name, d.title, p.title, r.name, t.name, '') AS target_name, oai.title, oai.subtitle, oai.image, oai.sort, oai.extra_json, oai.status
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM operation_activity oa LEFT JOIN city c ON c.id = oa.city_id AND c.region = oa.region LEFT JOIN ( SELECT activity_id, COUNT(1) AS item_count FROM operation_activity_item GROUP BY activity_id ) stats ON stats.activity_id = oa.id WHERE oa.id = #{id} AND oa.region = #{region} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM operation_activity WHERE LOWER(code) = LOWER(#{code})
AND id != #{excludeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_activity( name, code, region, city_id, channel, type, status, cover, landing_url, rule_json, start_at, end_at, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{code}, #{region}, #{cityId}, #{channel}, #{type}, #{status}, #{cover}, #{landingUrl}, #{ruleJson}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE operation_activity SET name = #{name}, code = #{code}, city_id = #{cityId}, channel = #{channel}, type = #{type}, cover = #{cover}, landing_url = #{landingUrl}, rule_json = #{ruleJson}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND region = #{region}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM operation_activity_item oai INNER JOIN operation_activity oa ON oa.id = oai.activity_id LEFT JOIN shop s ON oai.target_type = 1 AND s.id = oai.target_id AND s.region = oa.region LEFT JOIN deal d ON oai.target_type = 2 AND d.id = oai.target_id AND d.region = oa.region LEFT JOIN post p ON oai.target_type = 3 AND p.id = oai.target_id AND p.region = oa.region LEFT JOIN rank r ON oai.target_type = 4 AND r.id = oai.target_id AND r.region = oa.region LEFT JOIN topic t ON oai.target_type = 5 AND t.id = oai.target_id AND t.region = oa.region WHERE oai.activity_id = #{activityId} AND oa.region = #{region} ORDER BY oai.sort ASC, oai.id ASC

SELECT
FROM operation_activity_item oai INNER JOIN operation_activity oa ON oa.id = oai.activity_id LEFT JOIN shop s ON oai.target_type = 1 AND s.id = oai.target_id AND s.region = oa.region LEFT JOIN deal d ON oai.target_type = 2 AND d.id = oai.target_id AND d.region = oa.region LEFT JOIN post p ON oai.target_type = 3 AND p.id = oai.target_id AND p.region = oa.region LEFT JOIN rank r ON oai.target_type = 4 AND r.id = oai.target_id AND r.region = oa.region LEFT JOIN topic t ON oai.target_type = 5 AND t.id = oai.target_id AND t.region = oa.region WHERE oai.activity_id = #{activityId} AND oai.id = #{id} AND oa.region = #{region} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_activity_item( activity_id, target_type, target_id, title, subtitle, image, sort, extra_json, status ) VALUES ( #{activityId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{title}, #{subtitle}, #{image}, #{sort}, #{extraJson}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM deal WHERE id = #{targetId} AND region = #{region} AND audit_status = 1 AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post WHERE id = #{targetId} AND region = #{region} AND audit_status = 1 AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = FALSE
